zh.Prescot, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾普雷斯可特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Thurstanton於1211年出生在英國爾瑟爾斯塔斯頓時，她的父親Peter de Thurstanston26歲，母親Mrs. Peter de Thurstanston22歲。她和Sir Patric de Hallowell至少有5個兒子和4個女兒。

zh-hans.Prescot, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾普雷斯可特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes de Thurstanton于1211年出生在英国爾瑟爾斯塔斯頓时，她的父亲Peter de Thurstanston26岁，母亲Mrs. Peter de Thurstanston22岁。她和Sir Patric de Hallowell至少有5个儿子和4个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Thurstanton was born in 1211, in Thurstaston, Cheshire, England, her father, Peter de Thurstanston, was 26 and her mother, Mrs. Peter de Thurstanston, was 22. She had at least 5 sons and 4 daughters with Sir Patric de Hallowell.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Thurstanton est née en 1211, à Thurstaston, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Peter de Thurstanston, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Peter de Thurstanston, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles avec Sir Patric de Hallowell.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes de Thurstanton 1211 in Thurstaston, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Peter de Thurstanston 26 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Peter de Thurstanston 22. Sie hatte mit Sir Patric de Hallowell mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Thurstanton è nata il nel 1211 nel Thurstaston, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Peter de Thurstanston, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Peter de Thurstanston, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie con Sir Patric de Hallowell.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Thurstantonが1211年にイギリスチェシュアイアスウルスタストンで生まれた時，父Peter de Thurstanstonは26歳，母Mrs. Peter de Thurstanstonは22歳であった。彼女はSir Patric de Hallowellとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Thurstanton(이)가 1211년 영국 체실르 스르스타스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Peter de Thurstanston(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Peter de Thurstanston(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Sir Patric de Hallowell(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Thurstanton nasceu em 1211, em Thurstaston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Peter de Thurstanston, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Peter de Thurstanston, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas com Sir Patric de Hallowell.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Thurstanton родилась в 1211 г. в местности турстастон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Peter de Thurstanston было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Peter de Thurstanston, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери от Sir Patric de Hallowell.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes de Thurstanton nació en 1211, en Thurstaston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Peter de Thurstanston, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mrs. Peter de Thurstanston, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas con Sir Patric de Hallowell.
